**Section 4.1 - Duration:**
> "Unless earlier terminated otherwise provided therein, this Agreement, subject to the commencement date established in Section 1.3, shall be effective immediately."

1. **Ambiguous Effective Date**: The contract states it "shall be effective immediately" but also references "the commencement date established in Section 1.3" - however, **Section 1.3 is not included in the provided documents**. This conditional effectiveness means different parts of the Amendment become operative at different times, creating potential ambiguity about when obligations actually commence.

---

## Legal Concerns:

A lawyer should review whether the October 30, 2019 "Effective Date" conflicts with the conditional effectiveness provisions in Article 4, and clarify which obligations (if any) take effect on October 30, 2019 versus at the respective closings.
